mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyQstnDAO.srvyQstnList 설 명 : 설문문항목록 */ SELECT QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID , QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID , QSTN.QSTN_GBNCD , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_TTL , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(QSTN.QSTN_CTS, 4000, 1) AS QSTN_CTS , QSTN.ESNTL_RSPNSYN , QSTN.ETC_INPT_USEYN , QSTN.EDTR_USEYN , QSTN.SRVY_MVMN_USEYN , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID WHERE SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO
/* SQL ID : SrvyQstnDAO.srvypprQstnList 설 명 : 설문지문항목록 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SrvyQstnDAO.qstnSeqnoModify 설 명 : 문항순번수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN USING ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SRVY_QSTN_ID , SRVYPPR_ID , QSTN_SEQNO , #{qstnSeqno} AS NEW_QSTN_SEQNO , #{searchKey} AS CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId} ) A WHERE A.QSTN_SEQNO BETWEEN LEAST(A.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO) AND GREATEST(A.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO) ) OLD_QSTN ON ( QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID = OLD_QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID AND QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID IN (OLD_QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET QSTN.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , QSTN.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = OLD_QSTN.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO THEN OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO WHEN OLD_QSTN.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO > OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO THEN QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO + 1 ELSE QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO - 1 END
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyQstnDAO.profQstnCopySrvyQstnList 설 명 : 교수문항복사설문문항목록조회 */ WITH SBJCT AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , SBJCT_YR , SBJCT_SMSTR FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ), SRVY AS ( SELECT SRVY.SBJCT_ID , SRVY.SRVY_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON SRVY.SRVY_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID WHERE SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY.DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID , (SELECT SBJCT_YR FROM SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SRVY WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID)) AS SBJCT_YR , (SELECT SBJCT_SMSTR FROM SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SRVY WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID)) AS SBJCT_SMSTR , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_TTL FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN WHERE QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId} ORDER BY QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO
